name: Swift Title Loans
description_short: Swift Title Loans offers car title loans in Memphis with loan amounts from $100-$50,000 and same-day funding. They accept applicants with bad credit and past bankruptcies.
description_long:
Swift Title Loans operates a physical location in Memphis, Tennessee at 1473 S Trezevant St, offering title-secured loans as an emergency cash solution. The company specializes in car title loans, which allow borrowers to use their vehicle's title as collateral while retaining possession and use of the vehicle. Their service model targets individuals with poor credit histories, past bankruptcies, and limited access to traditional lending, positioning itself as an inclusive alternative financial service.

The company offers loan amounts ranging from $100 to $50,000, with an advertised process that allows customers to "get cash today" if they sign up by noon. They emphasize quick application (available online), same-day or next-day funding, and a straightforward repayment structure where borrowers receive their title back upon loan completion. The application process reportedly takes place both online and in-person at their Memphis location, with staff assistance throughout.

Swift Title Loans distinguishes itself primarily through personalized service, with customer reviews repeatedly highlighting an employee named Alfred who provides patient explanations and transparent terms. The company advertises 256-bit SSL and TLS security for online transactions and maintains extended business hours (9am-7pm weekdays, 10am-5pm Saturday). Their competitive positioning emphasizes acceptance of applicants with credit challenges and a streamlined application process compared to traditional lenders.

Customer reviews are consistently positive regarding service quality and staff professionalism, though the feedback reveals several operational limitations. The most honest assessment is that this is a title loan operation serving emergency borrowing needs—customers should understand that title loans are high-cost credit products typically carrying substantial interest rates and fees. While the company demonstrates transparency and good customer service practices, the fundamental product structure (using car titles as collateral) carries inherent risks for borrowers who default, and the cost of borrowing through this mechanism is significantly higher than traditional personal loans.
pros: Same-day funding available if application submitted by noon
Accepts applicants with bad credit history and past bankruptcies
Loan amounts up to $50,000, larger than typical payday loans
Allows borrowers to keep and drive their car while the title serves as collateral
Online application available in addition to in-person service
Staff (particularly noted employee Alfred) provides patient, transparent explanations of terms
Uses 256-bit SSL and TLS encryption for online security
cons: Title loans carry substantially higher interest rates and fees than traditional personal loans—actual APR not disclosed on website
Customers lose access to their vehicle if they default on the loan
Limited payment plan options according to multiple customer reviews
Physical location signage unclear for first-time visitors, creating navigation difficulty
No mobile app for payment management, limiting convenience for account administration
best_for: Individuals with poor credit who need emergency cash ($500-$2,000) within 24 hours and own a vehicle
People with past bankruptcies excluded from traditional lending who can afford title loan interest rates
Borrowers seeking larger emergency amounts ($2,000-$50,000) who have a car title but limited credit options
Those comparing title loans versus payday loans who want to retain vehicle use while borrowing
diagnosis: Swift Title Loans is best for borrowers with poor credit who own a vehicle and need emergency cash within 24 hours. The critical caveat is that title loans are high-cost credit products where default results in vehicle loss—this is a survival-level emergency lending tool, not a sustainable borrowing solution, and actual costs are not transparently disclosed on their website.
services: Same-day funding for applications submitted by noon
In-person application and consultation at Memphis location
Loan approval for applicants with bad credit
Loan approval for applicants with past bankruptcies
